caption: The video appears to be a presentation on "Large Corporate Farm Systems," created by @BrianDRPM and still under construction as of December 6, 2019. The presenter, Gene Bellinger, is seen in a small window on the right side of the screen, wearing headphones and speaking. The main content of the video transitions from an introductory slide that provides context and background information about the presentation, including its connection to the "Rural Community Food Systems Economic and Market Pathways" presentation. This introductory text explains that the current presentation is an interpretation of Christopher Chase's original Rich-Picture Food Systems Map and is intended to contrast with the rural community food system approach. The video then moves to the title slide of the presentation, which includes a "Start Presentation" button, indicating the beginning of the detailed discussion on large corporate farm systems.
